title: RIVN Q1 2024 Results and Quarterly Earnings Performance
text: Rivian delivered 13,588 vehicles in the first quarter of 2024. The company slightly beat analyst estimates on revenue in Q1 2024, which grew sharply year-over-year. The company posted wider losses than expected. Production came below the Visible Alpha estimate of 14,250 vehicles by about 2%, but deliveries of 13,588 beat the FactSet analyst estimate of 13,000 by 4.5%. Revenue for Q1 2024 reached approximately $1.2 billion. The company's Q1 earnings beat expectations on revenue but missed on earnings per share. Vehicle-level gross margins continued to show improvement trajectory. Cost per vehicle metrics showed steady improvement across generations. The company maintained guidance for full-year 2024 production. Management reaffirmed expectations for achieving positive gross profit by Q4 2024.
